overview: EscolaUI is a modular, multi-tenant school management system built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It connects to a live .NET 9 backend API and supports 16 modules including Students, Teachers, Admissions, Attendance, Fees, Schedule, Exams, Online Classes, Report Cards, ID Cards, HR & Payroll, Notifications, and a dedicated Platform Admin panel. Features per-school color branding, role-based access, and full demo mode.
features: Login with plain HTML form (no component library), JWT auth with auto-refresh
16 school management modules all wired to live API
SuperAdmin platform panel for tenant management, subscriptions, and payment reminders
Multi-tenant branding: school colors, logo, and name loaded from live API on startup
Role-based access: SuperAdmin, Principal, Teacher, Admissions Officer, Account Officer
Demo mode with full mock data and zero API calls
Per-school color themes applied dynamically throughout the UI
Bulk student CSV import with drag-and-drop and progress bar
Premier UI: glass-morphism cards, animated sidebar, premium typography
